excludedFeatures: 3DGUT/eval3d source kernels were intentionally excluded from this narrow build because the full build remained in long world-space compiler units during the interactive probe
leaderboardImpact: This proves gsplat-main source can build for the immediate 3DGS/MCMC ablation path. It is not a quality/FPS benchmark row and cannot support leaderboard SOTA claims by itself.
nextSteps: run a CUDA MCMC strategy smoke
compare measured Truck metrics against current AURA Beta and fixed-Gaussian rows before expanding to all 8 scenes
